response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with notable experience in event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz, re:cinq). However, his background lacks direct fintech or agentic-AI production experience, and his leadership roles have not reached the scale or executive-level responsibilities required for a CTO role. His technical depth in agentic frameworks or AI-native fintech integration is not clearly evidenced.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby).
Hands-on expertise in scalable backend systems (Node.js, Dlang, TypeScript) and real-time data processing.
Proven ability to build and maintain open-source projects with production-grade deployment (Kubernetes, CI/CD).
concerns: No explicit experience with agentic-AI systems or fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, liquidity management).
Limited leadership experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10-15 engineers (current roles emphasize individual contributions).
Lacks direct experience operating AI systems in regulated environments or high-stakes commercial contexts.
